issues.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.

issues.title: Browser errors were logged to the console
issues.description: Errors logged to the console indicate unresolved problems. They can come from network request failures and other browser concerns.

issues.title: Render-blocking requests
issues.description: Requests are blocking the page's initial render, which may delay LCP.

issues.title: Minimize main-thread work
issues.description: Consider reducing the time spent parsing, compiling and executing JS. You may find delivering smaller JS payloads helps with this.

issues.title: Improve image delivery
issues.description: Reducing the download time of images can improve the perceived load time of the page and LCP.

issues.title: Time to Interactive
issues.description: Time to Interactive is the amount of time it takes for the page to become fully interactive.

issues.title: Image elements do not have explicit `width` and `height`
issues.description: Set an explicit width and height on image elements to reduce layout shifts and improve CLS.

issues.title: Legacy JavaScript
issues.description: Polyfills and transforms enable older browsers to use new JavaScript features. However, many aren't necessary for modern browsers. Consider modifying your JavaScript build process to not transpile
